data.title: BBNX SHAREHOLDER NOTICE: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Investigates Claims on Behalf of Investors of Beta Bionics
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is reaching out to investors who have experienced substantial losses in Aquestive Therapeutics. If you have suffered significant losses in Beta Bionics stock or options, Wilson encourages you to get in touch with him directly to explore your potential options.

data.title: UNI price may reach $3.60-$3.80 in April based on technical indicators. Currently trading at $3.40 with neutral RSI and bearish MACD.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Uniswap (UNI) is currently trading at $3.40. According to technical indicators, the Relative Strength Index (RSI) shows a neutral stance while the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) is bearish. Analysis predicts a possible upward movement to the range of $3.60-$3.80 if the resistance at current levels is breached.

data.title: LINK price may hit $9.50 target soon as technicals show oversold conditions: Short-term target $9.20, medium-term $8.80-$10.50. Bullish breakout at $9.78, support at $8.38. #cryptocurrency

Looking ahead to the medium term, a range of $8.80 to $10.50 is forecasted for the next month. For a bullish breakout, the price point to watch for is $9.78. On the downside, critical support is identified at $8.38.

data.title: Polkadot aims for $1.32 breakout with 2.3% upside, technical indicators signal possible recovery. Forecast: $1.25-$1.32 range.

The Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates a neutral territory at present. The forecast for Polkadot suggests that the cryptocurrency may experience a period of range-bound movement, fluctuating between $1.25 and $1.32.

data.title: Dogecoin price may reach $0.10-$0.20 by April with mixed signals from tech indicators; Short-term target $0.095-$0.10.  #crypto
data.description: In the short term, the price prediction for DOGE is between $0.095 to $0.10 within a week. For the medium term, the forecast ranges from $0.10 to $0.15 over a month. The bullish breakout level is set at $0.10, aligned with the Upper Bollinger Band.

data.title: Record Your Passion: TORRAS Partners with Portugal Football for the Season Ahead
data.description: On March 28, 2026, it was announced that Portugal will partake in the upcoming World Cup, marking a significant moment for the team. The last time Portugal participated in a World Cup hosted in the United States was in 1994. This year, they have the opportunity to showcase their talent once again on American grounds, ending a 32-year absence from this stage. This event holds special importance for the team and its fans, unveiling a new chapter in their football journey.

data.title: ICOTYDE™ (icotrokinra) one-year results confirm lasting skin clearance and favorable safety profile in once‑daily pill for plaque psoriasis
data.description: New findings from Johnson & Johnson reveal impressive results in the ICONIC-ADVANCE 1 and 2 studies. The data demonstrates that nearly 60% of teenagers treated with ICOTYDE attained fully clear skin by Week 52 in the ICONIC-LEAD study. The study was conducted in SPRING HOUSE, Pennsylvania. This highlights the successful achievement of complete skin clearance at Week 24 and Week 52 with the high efficacy of ICOTYDE in adolescents.

data.title: Polygon (MATIC) at $0.38 may hit $0.43 by April 2026 as per technical analysis, with support crucial for bounce.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polygon (MATIC) is currently trading at a price of $0.38, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicating a neutral stance that could lead to a potential rebound. Analysis shows that there is a possibility of the price reaching the $0.43 resistance level in the next 4-6 weeks if the current support levels are maintained.

data.title: XRP price at $1.34 shows potential for $1.41 target despite bearish outlook aiming $1.31 support.
data.description: The cryptocurrency XRP is currently trading at $1.34, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 40.95, indicating a neutral position. Technical analysis points towards a possible increase to $1.41, a resistance level, however, bears are aiming for a drop to $1.31, a support level, in the near future.

data.title: Brander Group Ranked #188 on Fortune's America's Most Innovative Companies in 2026
data.description: Brander Group Inc. has recently secured the #188 spot on Fortune's prestigious America's Most Innovative Companies list. This accolade is noteworthy as only 300 companies in the country are selected annually for this coveted recognition. Brander Group now stands among the elite group of innovative companies highlighted by this distinction.

data.title: First Female Las Vegas Mayor Jan Jones Blackhurst Joins ChargerGoGo, Inspiring the Next Generation of Women Leaders
data.description: ChargerGoGo, a company with over 1 million users, has welcomed Jan Jones Blackhurst, the inaugural female Mayor of Las Vegas, as their new Strategic Advisor. The addition of Blackhurst signifies a significant advancement in the company's efforts to expand its user network. Their goal is not only to grow their user base, but also to encourage and empower more women to take on leadership roles and thrive in the world of entrepreneurship. This development was announced on March 27, 2026, in Las Vegas.

data.title: Scispot Launches Labforms™ to Capture External Lab Data as Structured, Audit-Ready Records
data.description: Scispot, a company based in Kitchener, Ontario, has introduced a new tool called Labforms on March 27, 2026. This tool is a form builder specifically designed for life science labs that allows them to collect data from partners without requiring accounts or using spreadsheets. Labforms streamline the process by integrating the collected data directly into internal workflows. This innovation provides labs with a more efficient way to manage and organize data.

data.title: Precision Electrical Processes $1.5M in Bids Using Autonomous AI Estimating
data.description: In August 2025, an Indianapolis contractor embraced Makeoff and has since implemented AI-driven estimating for all commercial projects exceeding $50,000, resulting in the generation of 10 to 15 comprehensive bids monthly. The company, located in Buffalo, N.Y., referred to as Precision Electrical, recently announced this standardization initiative on March 27, 2026.

data.title: Sentry Technology Solutions Named GTIA IT Service Provider of the Year
data.description: Sentry Technology Solutions, a prominent provider of managed IT services, cybersecurity, and AI solutions, was recently awarded the prestigious title of GTIA IT Service Provider of the Year. This recognition is bestowed upon technology companies that excel in delivering outstanding solutions, acting as reliable advisors, and aiding businesses in improving their IT infrastructure. Sentry Technology Solutions has been acknowledged for its exceptional services and dedication to providing top-notch IT solutions.

data.title: Aviva Aesthetics Partners with Nationally Recognized Injector Jordan White and Urban Medical, Expanding into Arizona and Virginia
data.description: Jordan White has recently decided to team up with Aviva Aesthetics after exploring conventional private equity alternatives. This move allows White to maintain complete ownership while enhancing long-term enterprise value. The collaboration, set to take place in Chicago, was confirmed on March 27, 2026. Aviva Aesthetics, a burgeoning national medical company, secured this partnership as part of its strategic growth plan.
